paper_title: Trend Analysis of Relatively Large Diatoms in the Ariake Sea, Japan

methods.description: This method analyzes the trends of chlorophyll-a concentration in the Ariake Sea using data from MODIS, tower, and ship measurements. The analysis focuses on the relationship between tidal patterns and chlorophyll-a concentration over several years.

steps.description: Collect MODIS, tower, and ship data of chlorophyll-a concentrations for January to February from 2011 to 2015.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch chlorophyll-a concentration data from MODIS, tower, and ship for specified periods

steps.description: Analyze the trends of chlorophyll-a concentration in relation to spring and neap tides.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze chlorophyll-a trends with respect to tidal patterns

steps.description: Identify peaks and valleys in chlorophyll-a concentration during spring and neap tides.
steps.searchable_summary: identify peaks and valleys in chlorophyll-a data

methods.description: This method involves collecting and preparing data for analysis, including chlorophyll-a concentration from various sources and meteorological data.

steps.description: Collect truth data of chlorophyll-a concentration from observation towers and MODIS for January 1 to February 1 from 2011 to 2015.
steps.searchable_summary: collect chlorophyll-a concentration data from towers and MODIS

steps.description: Collect meteorological data including sunshine duration, ocean wind speed and direction, and tidal heights for the same periods.
steps.searchable_summary: collect meteorological data for specified periods

methods.method_name: Validation of Chlorophyll-a Concentration Estimation Algorithm
methods.description: This method validates the algorithm used for estimating chlorophyll-a concentration by comparing MODIS derived data with truth data from shipment and tower measurements.

steps.description: Compare tower data of chlorophyll-a concentration with shipment data.
steps.searchable_summary: validate chlorophyll-a estimation by comparing tower and shipment data

steps.description: Investigate the relation between truth data and MODIS derived chlorophyll-a concentration.
steps.searchable_summary: investigate relation between truth data and MODIS chlorophyll-a data

steps.description: Use averaged chlorophyll-a concentration per day for validation due to varied data acquisition times.
steps.searchable_summary: average chlorophyll-a concentration data for validation
